category_title: Desktop stapler with hinged top arm
prompt: A full-strip desktop stapler with a heavy base, a rear-hinged staple magazine above the base deck, a separate top arm carried on the back of the magazine, and a rotating clincher anvil under the nose. The staple magazine rotates upward on a rear horizontal revolute hinge supported by the hinge tower at the back of the base, the top arm rotates on its own rear horizontal revolute hinge at the tail of the magazine, and the front anvil rotates on a small pivot in the base. Standard office-desk scale.
label: Full strip stapler with rear hinged magazine

category_title: Desktop stapler with hinged top arm
prompt: A compact half-strip stapler with a weighted base, a narrow staple magazine hinged from the rear of the base, a curved top arm mounted to the rear of the magazine, and a sliding paper stop on the base deck. The magazine rotates on a rear horizontal revolute hinge above the base, the top arm rotates on a second rear revolute hinge at the back of the magazine body, and the paper stop slides prismatically along the base to set throat depth. Small desktop office-tool scale.
label: Compact stapler with hinged magazine and paper stop

category_title: Desktop stapler with hinged top arm
prompt: A long-reach desktop stapler with an elongated base, a raised rear hinge support, a staple magazine that opens upward from the rear support, and a long top arm hinged at the back of the magazine. The magazine rotates on a rear horizontal revolute hinge anchored to the back of the base, the top arm rotates on its own rear hinge at the magazine tail, the follower block slides prismatically along the magazine channel, and the clincher plate under the nose rotates on a small pivot in the base. Mailroom or reception-desk scale.
label: Long reach stapler with two rear hinges

category_title: Desktop stapler with hinged top arm
prompt: A die-cast desktop stapler with a flat rectangular base, a boxy staple magazine connected to a rear hinge tower, a low-profile top arm carried on the back of the magazine, and a reversible anvil in the base. The staple magazine rotates upward on a rear horizontal revolute hinge at the hinge tower, the top arm rotates on a second rear revolute hinge at the back of the magazine shell, and the reversible anvil rotates on a short central pivot beneath the stapling nose. Dense desk-accessory scale with a practical office silhouette.
label: Die cast stapler with rear hinge tower

category_title: Desktop stapler with hinged top arm
prompt: A premium desktop stapler with a broad base, a rear-hinged staple magazine, a tapered top arm mounted on a separate hinge at the back of the magazine, and a rear spring follower inside the magazine. The magazine rotates on a rear horizontal revolute joint above the base, the top arm rotates on its own rear revolute joint at the magazine spine, the follower block slides prismatically along the magazine channel, and a small front anvil rotates on a pivot in the base. Standard office-desk scale.
label: Premium stapler with separate magazine hinge
